title: Contract Project Manager – Mechanical Utilities (Immediate Start)
description_raw:
Hays Engineering are recruiting urgently for a Contract Project Manager to take over an in-flight mechanical utilities upgrade programme at a large steel manufacturing facility in Sheffield. The previous PM has left unexpectedly and the client needs someone to mobilise as soon as possible — ideally within 5 working days.

The programme covers the replacement of ageing compressed air generation and distribution systems, cooling water circuits for furnace support, and steam-heating systems across three production bays. The programme is approximately 40% complete and has approximately 5 months remaining to mechanical completion and commissioning.

Immediate priority actions for the new PM:
- Full programme review and revised baseline schedule (P6)
- Stakeholder re-engagement with main mechanical contractor and client operations
- Outstanding HAZOP and risk register review
- Material procurement chase for outstanding long-lead items

Requirements:
- Degree or HND in mechanical engineering
- Minimum 6 years’ PM experience in utilities or process plant
- Able to start immediately — this is the primary selection criterion
- PRINCE2 Practitioner or APM PMQ
- Must be able to provide evidence of right to work in the UK

Rate: £620 per day (outside IR35)
Duration: 5–6 months to programme completion
Start: ASAP — immediate mobilisation required
Location: Sheffield city outskirts (bus route accessible from Sheffield centre; parking available)
